common.tagline: All your favourite clothes in one app
common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.checkEmail: We sent you a confirmation email. Open the link inside, then sign in.

errors.emailInUse: An account with this email already exists.
errors.weakPassword: Password is too short — use at least 8 characters.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email first — check your inbox.
errors.generic: Couldn't complete that. Check your details and try again.

onboarding.profileTitle: Tell us a bit about yourself
onboarding.profileSubtitle: Everything is optional — skip anything you like.
onboarding.styleSubtitle: Write freely: what clothes you prefer, which shades, what kind of outfits, what contrast. Recommendations are based on this.
onboarding.stylePlaceholder: For example: I like oversized clothes, neutral shades — beige, white, grey — with occasional pops of colour. I prefer smart casual outfits…

wardrobe.emptyBody: Add your first piece with a photo — it shows up here looking like it's from a store.

wishlist.emptyBody: Paste a link from a store and we'll save the photo, price and sizes.

discover.emptyBody: Add a few clothes to your wardrobe and we'll suggest outfits.

profile.deleteAccountBody: All your clothes, collections and data will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
